impact: This advances checkbox-199 by pinning the daemon selection expectation that blocked recovery tasks remain skipped when a fresh unchecked daemon-repair task is available, without touching PP&D domain implementation or live automation.
summary: Add a focused daemon blocked-selection unittest using plain line/string parsing only.
target_task: Task checkbox-199: Add one daemon-only blocked-selection unittest using plain string parsing, not custom regex named-group syntax, proving blocked checkbox-178/182/186/187/191/193/194/195/197 are skipped when a fresh unchecked daemon-repair task exists.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
